description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and predominantly dark plumage. The bird features a slender, pointed beak and a smooth, slightly glossy surface texture, suggesting healthy feathers. Its wings are folded tightly against its body, and the tail is straight and tapers to a point. The legs and feet are partially visible, with claws tucked beneath the body. There is a subtle patch of lighter coloration on the upper back, adding contrast to the otherwise uniform dark feathers. The overall form and proportions are consistent with a passerine bird commonly found in urban environments.
description: A medium-sized, dark-feathered bird with a pointed beak, folded wings, and a straight, tapered tail. Subtle lighter markings are visible on its back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, pointed beak, and folded wings with a slight highlight on the back.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the bird's symmetrical body, lighter patch on the upper back, and the alignment of the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bird's other profile, visible claws, and the smooth contour of the body and beak.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the pointed tail and the overall tapering shape of the bird's body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mostly solid black with a small lighter patch on the upper back
